question: I'm looking for a specific Texas county that was a top spender on capital outlay between 2018 and 2021. Among the top five spenders, this county was one of the two highest for average prison releases in 2019-2020, and unlike its peer, it saw a significant increase in veteran affair disability recipients from the year after the year (within 2017-2019) that has the lowest total annual average daily traffic count for all New York State Routes and roads to the year after the year (within 2017-2022) that has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports. Once you identify this county, tell me which University of Houston System universities located in its county seat was founded earliest. Only report the name of the university. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Count by Year for 2017-2019, the minimum total is 73796464 in 2018.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2019 has the lowest total annual average daily traffic count for all New York State Routes and roads? (Sum Count by Year and select the minimum.)

2.fact: Filtering FlightType = "Charter" and summing Passenger_Count by year (from ReportPeriod) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 25993 in 2021.
2.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports? (Filter FlightType == "Charter"; derive year from ReportPeriod; sum Passenger_Count by year and select the maximum.)

7.fact: In the FY2019 TDCJ Releases dataset, release counts for the top Capital Outlay counties.
